# Recall Contacts

> iPhone contacts app that lets you find anyone by what you remember — a hashtag, a place, a moment — not by how their name is spelled. Built for dyslexic, ADHD, and neurodivergent minds. Works brilliantly for everyone.

Recall Contacts is a free iPhone app created by photographer Paul Barbera. It layers on top of your existing Apple Contacts — nothing moves, nothing breaks. Tag people with hashtags (#NYC, #wedding, #schoolrun, #doctor) and search by context instead of spelling. All data stays on your device. No account required. No cloud sync.

## Product

- [Home](https://recall-contacts.com/): Overview, features, screenshots, demo video, and App Store download
- [Features](https://recall-contacts.com/features): Every feature explained — hashtag tagging, Smart Groups, Parent Mode, Dog Mode, BCC Mode, Quick Recall, and more
- [Instructions](https://recall-contacts.com/instructions): Step-by-step guide to using Recall — tagging, searching, Smart Groups, Parent Mode, Review Queue, themes, and tips
- [App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/recall-contacts/id6758255331): Download Recall Contacts for iPhone — free

## Help & Support

- [Support](https://recall-contacts.com/support): Full help guide — getting started, features, settings, troubleshooting, and contact information

## Articles

- [Why I Built Recall](https://recall-contacts.com/blog/why-i-built-recall.html): Paul Barbera's personal story — a dyslexic photographer who spent 25 years meeting people and forgetting their names
- [The Dyslexic Mind: Workaround Genius](https://recall-contacts.com/blog/dyslexic-mind-workaround-genius.html): How dyslexic brains compensate for naming challenges with context and pattern recognition
- [You Know Her as Mia's Mom](https://recall-contacts.com/blog/mias-mom.html): The word for knowing someone only through their child — and how Recall's Parent Mode solves it
- [Apple's Contacts App Is Older Than Google](https://recall-contacts.com/blog/parents-qr-code-contacts.html): Why the native Contacts app fails parents at school pickup, and what we built instead
- [Face Swap's Creator on Marketing Recall](https://recall-contacts.com/blog/marketing-with-jason-laan.html): Jason Laan's honest assessment of how Paul is marketing Recall — and what to do differently

## People

- [Team](https://recall-contacts.com/team.html): Paul Barbera (photographer, creator) and Jason Laan (co-founder, Laan Labs) — the two people behind Recall Contacts

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://recall-contacts.com/privacy.html): Fully on-device. No account required. No cloud sync. Your data stays yours.
